confidence_rationale: Clear instructional content showing VR laparoscopy training exercise with visible UI elements, instructions, and educational progression through numbered cube identification.
cannot_determine: FLS task scoring - this is educational VR content, not a standard FLS task performance
technique_summary: VR-based laparoscopic scope orientation training using numbered cube identification exercise to develop hand-eye coordination and spatial navigation skills.

demonstrated_techniques: Using left controller as scope for navigation
Using right controller as instrument for interaction
Focusing on targets until visual confirmation (green ring)
Sequential number identification for systematic practice
Camera rotation for exploring different viewing angles
verbal_cues: Navigate with your scope to find the numbers on the cubes
Touch and hold the cube with your right controller, a number will show up
Focus on the number until the ring turns green
Rotate the camera to look around the corner
common_errors_addressed: Poor hand-eye coordination in laparoscopic environment
